text: Stock performance has significantly underperformed the broader market, with ADBE returning -36.85% over the past year compared to SPY's +16.23%, resulting in an excess return of -53.09% (K015, K016, K017). Recent trading sessions have shown continued pressure, with shares declining approximately 1.7% following Google's announcement of enhanced image editing capabilities via Gemini (Recent Developments summary). This competitive dynamic in the AI-enabled creative software market represents a key focus for investors and contributes to near-term sentiment headwinds.
